Package io.vanslog.spring.data.meilisearch.core.convert

Class MappingMeilisearchConverter

java.lang.Object
io.vanslog.spring.data.meilisearch.core.convert.MappingMeilisearchConverter
All Implemented Interfaces:
MeilisearchConverter, Aware, InitializingBean, ApplicationContextAware
public class MappingMeilisearchConverter extends Object implements MeilisearchConverter, ApplicationContextAware, InitializingBean
MeilisearchConverter Implementation based on MappingContext.
Author:
Junghoon Ban
